summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lluvia Live streaming platform MVP. All core features working perfectly with beautiful purple/pink/blue design.
passed_tests: User registration with bcrypt password hashing
User profile with coins (1000), level (1), diamonds (0), badges
Room creation with unique IDs and owner tracking
Room listing with real-time user counts
Join/leave seat functionality with real-time updates
User avatar display in seats with level indicators
Dashboard navigation between tabs (Salas, Juegos, Rankings, Clanes)
Profile view with user stats and logout
Beautiful responsive UI with purple/pink/blue gradients
Backend API endpoints (13/13 tests passed - 100% success rate)
